title: Xquik MCP Server
author: Xquik-dev
detailMarkdown:
# Xquik MCP Server

Remote MCP server for X and Twitter automation: tweet search, profile timelines, follower export, media workflows, webhooks, and confirmation-gated write actions.

## Trust
- Source: source-backed
- Package: no package download
- Review: unclaimed

## Install
```bash
npx -y mcp-remote@0.1.38 https://xquik.com/mcp --header "x-api-key:${XQUIK_API_KEY}"
```

## Config
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "xquik": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": [
        "-y",
        "mcp-remote@0.1.38",
        "https://xquik.com/mcp",
        "--header",
        "x-api-key:${XQUIK_API_KEY}"
      ],
      "env": {
        "XQUIK_API_KEY": "xq_YOUR_KEY_HERE"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Usage
export XQUIK_API_KEY=xq_YOUR_KEY_HERE
npx -y mcp-remote@0.1.38 https://xquik.com/mcp --header "x-api-key:${XQUIK_API_KEY}"
seoTitle: Xquik MCP Server for Claude X and Twitter Automation
seoDescription: Use Xquik with Claude for tweet search, profile timelines, follower export, media workflows, webhooks, and confirmation-gated X write actions through MCP.
